packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
优化相机性能，提升整体稳定性
优化网络连接兼容性和稳定性，提升网络使用体验
优化逍遥游国际上网体验
修复部分游戏场景出现低概率闪退或内存异常问题
优化系统稳定性
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 2 月，提升系统安全性

【相机】
优化相机清晰度、影调和色彩效果，提升拍照效果体验
优化相机性能，提升整体稳定性

【通信】
优化网络连接兼容性和稳定性，提升网络使用体验
优化小窗场景下游戏网络体验

【游戏】
优化王者荣耀、我的世界、绝区零等游戏流畅性
优化光遇游戏发热问题

【系统】
优化抖音看视频发热问题
优化抖音页面导航区显示异常问题
优化系统稳定性与流畅性
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 1 月，提升系统安全性
修复播放视频时，低概率出现花屏问题
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Camera】
Improves the clarity, tone, and color accuracy of photos for a better photography experience.
Improves the performance and stability of Camera.

【Communication】
Improves network compatibility and stability for a better user experience.

【Games】
Optimizes network experience when you are playing in a floating window.
Improves the performance of games such as Honor of Kings, Minecraft, and Zenless Zone Zero.
Fixes an issue that might cause overheating when playing Sky: Children of the Light.

【System】
Fixes an issue that might cause overheating when watching short videos in Douyin.
Fixes a display issue with the navigation area of Douyin.
Improves system stability and performance.
Integrates the January 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.
Fixes an issue that might cause the screen to go fuzzy when you play a video.

Improves the performance and stability of Camera.

Improves network compatibility and stability for a better user experience.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【相机】
优化相机拍摄效果和稳定性，改善相机拍照体验

【通信】
修复 NFC 概率性读卡失败问题，优化刷卡体验
优化网络连接稳定性，提升网络使用体验

【系统】
优化系统稳定性与流畅性
优化部分场景手机的续航能力
修复微信发送图片时低概率无法加载图片问题
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Camera】
Improves camera performance and stability for a better user experience.

【Communication】
Fixes an issue where you might be unable to copy NFC cards with your phone; improves the NFC function.
Improves network stability for a better user experience.

【System】
Improves system stability and performance.
Extends battery life in some scenarios.
Fixes an issue where the photos you send in WeChat might not be fully displayed.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【应用】
相机新增水印大师，随心定制个性化水印，张张大片

【通信互联】
新增支持与 iOS 一碰互传功能，双端触碰即可互传图片与文件
优化网络无缝切换功能，网络切换更丝滑
优化网络连接稳定性和兼容性，提升网络使用体验

【系统】
优化企业微信视频通话功耗表现
优化抖音视频播放清晰度
提升系统稳定性
修复指纹解锁低概率失效问题
修复部分短视频应用在切换、暂停视频时，出现杂音问题

【相机】
优化相机拍摄效果和稳定性，改善相机拍照体验
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Apps】
Adds a new feature to Camera for personalized watermarks.

【Communication & interconnection】
Adds a Touch to share feature that supports iOS devices. You can share photos and files with a touch.
Improves the experience of switching between different Wi-Fi networks.
Improves the stability and compatibility of network connections for a better user experience.

【System】
Fixes a power consumption issue with video calls using WeCom.
Improves video clarity in Douyin.
Improves system stability.
Fixes an issue where fingerprint unlock might occasionally fail.
Fixes a noise issue with some short video apps when switching or pausing a video.

【Camera】
Improves camera performance and stability for a better user experience.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
AI
新增一拖即问，文本、文件、图片可一步拖至屏幕下方的小布胶囊，快速解析，随心提问
新增 AI 意图搜索功能，支持使用自然语言，通过小布或全局搜索搜到手机内保存的文档、图片、日程等信息，轻松找到手机上的各种零散信息
应用
新增翻译应用，整合拍照翻译、对话翻译、同声传译、实时字幕等多种翻译功能，并支持更多语种互译，让你随时随地畅译无阻
新增快捷功能卡片，将长辈常用功能纳入其中，一键直达
新增游戏静音启动功能，开启后启动游戏时自动静音，避免打扰（游戏时打开游戏助手-工具-游戏静音启动）
优化相册图片误删除问题，通过即时通知引导你前往相册“最近删除”查看
安全隐私
新增文件管理、便签和相册的最近删除入口支持密码校验，防止隐私泄露
新增在手机管家的清理存储中，支持点击“存储情况”查看内存占用详情
新增屏幕共享过程中支持屏蔽敏感应用和通知，保护隐私安全（设置-安全和隐私-屏幕共享保护）
新增支持在更改密码 4 天内，若忘记密码，可通过旧密码重置
通信互联
新增小布通话支持智能识别外卖、快递、打车等高频来电场景，不仅能自动接听电话，还支持自定义回复话术；通话结束后，小布会生成智能摘要，并为你标识重点内容
新增支持手机与 Windows 电脑 O+互联，实现跨端文件管理，让办公更方便
新增全局搜索支持搜索电话本、通话等应用中的设置项
系统
新增通知堆叠效果，优化锁屏通知视觉和交互，视觉更美观，操作更简单
新增锁屏界面向右滑动也可以进入乐划锁屏
新增内容拖拽设置项，支持长按拖拽三方应用中的图片和文字（设置-辅助功能-内容拖拽）
新增游戏内浮窗跳转功能，开启后在部分游戏内跳转至其它应用时，该应用将以浮窗打开（设置-辅助功能-自由浮窗-浮窗跳转）
新增浮窗大小与位置记忆功能
优化抽屉模式视觉和交互，视觉更一致，操作更便捷
优化系统界面及图标，更美观
优化浮窗、分屏应用窗口动效与兼容性，提升使用体验
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 5 月，提升系统安全性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
AI
You can now drag and drop text, images, or photos to Breeno and ask questions about them.
You can now search your device for documents, photos, events, and more in natural, conversational language with Breeno and Global Search.
Apps
Adds the Translate app, which allows you to take photos of text to translate, as well as translate conversations and documents. It also includes live translation and supports additional languages.
Adds a new widget with quick functions specifically tailored to elderly users to enhance usability.
You can now open games in muted mode when you want a distraction-free gaming experience. This feature can be found in "Game Assistant - Tools - Play games muted".
Fixes an issue where photos might be accidentally deleted by a third-party app. When this happens, you will receive a notification to review deleted photos in Recently deleted.
Security & privacy
You can now protect your recently deleted items in the My Files, Notes, and Photos apps with a password for added privacy.
You can view storage usage by apps and the system when freeing up space using Phone Manager.
During Screen sharing, you can block specific apps and notifications. This feature is available in "Settings - Security & privacy - Screen sharing protection".
After changing your Lock screen password, you can reset it using the previous password.
Communication & interconnection
Breeno Call can automatically identify food delivery, package delivery, ride-hailing, and other calls, and answer these calls on your behalf. You can customize the responses as needed. After a call ends, a summary highlighting key points will generated.
The O+ Connect app now supports Windows, allowing you to connect your mobile device to a Windows computer and manage files across devices effortlessly.
Global Search now supports settings within the Contacts and Phone apps.
System
Improves the visuals for individual notifications, notification stacks, and user interactions with these notifications on the Lock screen.
You can now enter Lock Screen Magazine by swiping right on the Lock screen.
Adds the Drag & drop feature that allows you to use the gesture to perform actions on images and text in third-party apps. This feature can be turned on or off in "Settings - Accessibility & convenience - Drag & drop".
You can now open a floating window when redirected to another app from a game. This feature can be turned on or off in "Settings - Accessibility & convenience - Floating Window - Redirect via floating window".
The size and position of floating windows are now saved for more convenient usage.
Redesigns the app drawer for a more consistent visual style, improving usability throughout the interface.
Improves the user interface and icon designs.
Improves the animations and compatibility for floating windows and Split View.
Integrates the May 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.

packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
相机
优化实况照片的分辨率和防抖效果，画质更好
通信互联
新增“决胜巅峰”游戏的碰一碰组队功能，在游戏组队界面将手机靠近，就能实现快速组队
新增远程控制 Windows 电脑功能，支持远程访问电脑文件和控制电脑屏幕，实现远程轻办公和文件远程互传。
新增跨屏互联时支持手机不开启 WLAN 开关就可进行通信共享
优化部分蜂窝网络环境下的网络算法，提升上网流畅性
应用
新增使用技巧应用图标，帮你解锁更多好用有趣功能
新增小布记忆功能，三指上滑随时触发屏幕闪记，存储于小布记忆 APP 内；小布记忆 APP 内支持信息解析摘要，按内容一键归类于合集内，海量信息高效整理，实现一站式记忆管理
新增 AI 文档支持思维导图功能，可一键生成思维导图，还能以图片形式分享和导出
新增游戏相机功能，支持一键回录和实况截屏，记录游戏中的每一个精彩瞬间
多媒体
新增扬声器清灰排水功能，有助于保持扬声器的良好效果（手机管家-常用工具-更多-辅助功能-清灰排水）
新增声音分轨功能，支持调节音乐中人声、背景声的音量
系统
新增系统导航唤醒小布开关，方便操作（设置-系统与更新-系统导航方式）
新增系统支持在非安全渠道安装的应用获取敏感权限时进行主动拦截，防止恶意应用轻易获取敏感权限，保护隐私
新增在设置中搜索支持空格模糊搜索，优化搜索结果
新增支持在设置中搜索应用名称，方便查看应用详情并管理应用
优化锁屏快捷功能入口启动动效，无缝过渡进入应用界面，提升使用体验
优化键盘按键布局，操作更便捷，视觉更美观
优化锁屏通知堆叠效果，通知较多时，在最后一条以摘要形式呈现未展示的通知数量及来源
优化在设置中搜索时，部分搜索结果的排序
更新 Android 安全补丁至 2025 年 6 月，提升系统安全性
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
Camera
Enhances the image quality of live photos by improving resolution and anti-shake effects.
Communication & interconnection
Adds the "Tap to team up" feature in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. You can quickly team up by bringing phones close together with the team-up screen open.
Adds remote control support for Windows PC. You can now control your PC and access PC files remotely with your mobile device.
Adds support for sharing communication functions without turning on Wi-Fi on the phone when using Multi-Screen Connect.
Improves the cellular network algorithm for smoother network connections.
Apps
Adds the app icon for Tips to the Home screen. Discover more interesting features now!
Adds the Breeno Memory feature. You can swipe up with 3 fingers to add screen content to the app as a memory. The app can also analyze and summarize the memories for you, as well as archive them as collections.
Adds the Mind mapping feature in Documents. It allows you to generate mind maps with one tap, and export them to Photos or share them.
Introduces Game Camera, which provides Live screenshots and Flashback recording to help you capture your epic gaming moments.
Multimedia
Adds the Speaker cleaner feature, which can clean speakers and ensure optimal speaker performance. You can change the settings for this feature in "Phone Manager - Tools - More - Accessibility & convenience - Speaker cleaner".
Adds the Track Splitter feature, which allows for the adjustment of volume for vocals and background sounds in music.
System
Adds the option to wake Breeno in system navigation. You can change the settings for this feature in "Settings - System & update - System navigation".
The system can now actively trigger an interception when apps installed through non-secure sources require sensitive permissions.
You can now perform fuzzy searches that include spaces in Settings.
You can now search for app names in Settings to quickly view app details or manage apps.
You can now seamlessly open an app from quick functions when the screen is locked.
Improves the keyboard layout for more convenient operations and more appealing visuals.
When notifications are stacked, the latest notification will now display a summary showing the number of undisplayed notifications and their sources.
Optimizes the display order of search results in Settings.
Integrates the June 2025 Android security patch to enhance system security.
